rationale: Hard pass. The archetype's pastel pink/red kitchen ASMR aesthetic clashes directly with TheSphinx's dark, mystical gold-on-black premium look, and pouring spices has zero conceptual bridge to a voice-driven Q&A celebrity-guessing loop. The ASMR/satisfying-pour audience skews casual scroll-hypnotists rather than the educated 25-45 trivia enthusiasts we need — don't adapt this template, the frictions are too deep to salvage.
